since_last: 48% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.91%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.96% · BTC -2.40% · Gold -0.81% · Nasdaq100 -2.73%. 48% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.91%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.91%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.56%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -11.75%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.35% at $161.33
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
